semantic.role: Configuration factory module providing a default SpineConfig object for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Constructs and returns a default SpineConfig object with predefined values.
Ensures the configuration uses the current schema version (CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION).
Integrates the default scan policy (DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY) into the configuration.
outOfScope: Loading configuration from external sources (e.g., files, environment).
Runtime modification of configuration after creation.
invariants: The returned SpineConfig must always include the CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION.
The returned SpineConfig must always include the DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY.
The project name defaults to 'unnamed-project' and locales to ['en-US'].

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, default configuration factory for the ArchSpine system, ensuring consistent initial configuration across the application.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Tighten schema handling and add try preview, which may involve ensuring the default config aligns with the latest schema version.

English.role: Configuration factory module providing a default SpineConfig object for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Constructs and returns a default SpineConfig object with predefined values.
Ensures the configuration uses the current schema version (CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION).
Integrates the default scan policy (DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY) into the configuration.
outOfScope: Loading configuration from external sources (e.g., files, environment).
Runtime modification of configuration after creation.

Simplified Chinese.role: 为 ArchSpine 系统提供默认 SpineConfig 对象的配置工厂模块。
responsibilities: 构建并返回一个包含预定义值的默认 SpineConfig 对象。
确保配置使用当前架构版本（CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION）。
将默认扫描策略（DEFAULT_SCAN_POLICY）集成到配置中。
outOfScope: 配置验证或架构强制检查。
从外部源（如文件、环境变量）加载配置。
创建后对配置的运行时修改。
